## Summary

A brief description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like to see it implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any screenshots, mockups, or references here.
